mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_record (user_id, book_id, borrow_time, due_time, return_time, renew_time, renew_count, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowTime}, #{dueTime}, #{returnTime}, #{renewTime}, #{renewCount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, book_id, borrow_time, due_time, return_time, renew_time, renew_count, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM borrow_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET status = #{status}, return_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 2 THEN NOW() ELSE return_time END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE borrow_record SET status = 1, due_time = DATE_ADD(due_time, INTERVAL 30 DAY), renew_time = NOW(), renew_count = renew_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND renew_count < #{maxRenewCount} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (0, 1, 3) AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, user_id, book_id, borrow_time, due_time, return_time, renew_time, renew_count, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM borrow_record WHERE status IN (0, 1) AND due_time < NOW() AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT br.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.cover_url, COUNT(*) AS borrow_count FROM borrow_record br JOIN book_info b ON br.book_id = b.id AND b.is_deleted = 0 WHERE br.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY br.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.cover_url ORDER BY borrow_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (0,1,3) AND due_time < NOW() AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE status IN (0,1,3) AND due_time < NOW() AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT bc.category_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM borrow_record br JOIN book_info b ON br.book_id = b.id AND b.is_deleted = 0 JOIN book_category bc ON b.category_id = bc.id AND bc.is_deleted = 0 WHERE br.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY bc.id, bc.category_name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%m-%d') AS day, COALESCE(borrow.cnt, 0) AS borrow_count, COALESCE(overdue.cnt, 0) AS overdue_count FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) AS date FROM ( SELECT 0 n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 ) nums ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(borrow_time) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM borrow_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND borrow_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(borrow_time) ) borrow ON d.date = borrow.dt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(due_time) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM borrow_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 3 AND due_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(due_time) ) overdue ON d.date = overdue.dt ORDER BY d.date

SELECT CASE status WHEN 0 THEN '借阅中' WHEN 1 THEN '已续借' WHEN 2 THEN '已归还' WHEN 3 THEN '已逾期' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM borrow_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
